signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate confirmed at 2.2% (up from 2.0% in Feb), below market forecasts of 2.4% | NO | HIGH confidence** [1][2]

South Korea's Consumer Price Index data for March 2026, released around early April, shows **annual inflation rising slightly to 2.2%** from 2.0% in January and February, but undershooting expectations[1]. A secondary source reports it as 2.16% yea

signals.headline: IUML Fields Two Women Candidates for First Time in Kerala Assembly Elections on April 9** | YES | MED confidence[1]
